page_description: Find local workshops, gatherings, and community events near you. Connect with neighbours, learn new skills, and join shared experiences in your area.
near_me_no_location: Set your location in your profile to use Near me
title: Events
subtitle: Discover and join community events

detail.submit_for_review_confirm: Submit this event to the moderation queue? Organisers can still edit it while it is awaiting review.
detail.publish_event_confirm: Publish this event now? It will become visible to eligible members and may trigger notifications and federation.
detail.offer_available_title: A place is available for you
detail.offer_available_description: You now have a reserved place from the waitlist. Accept it to confirm your attendance.
detail.accept_offer_aria: Accept the available place for this event
detail.decline_offer_aria: Decline the available place for this event
detail.offer_accepted: Your place at the event is confirmed.
detail.offer_accept_failed: We could not accept the place. Please try again.
detail.publication_failed: We could not update the event publication status.
detail.lifecycle_private_notice: Only authorised organisers and event staff can see this lifecycle state.
detail.not_found_desc: The event you are looking for does not exist
detail.no_attendees: No attendees yet. Be the first to RSVP!
detail.no_checkin_attendees: No attendees to check in yet.
detail.rsvp_panel_desc: Let the organizer know whether you plan to attend.
detail.meta_description_fallback: {{title}} is a community event on {{date}} with {{organizer}} at {{location}}.
detail.archive_confirm: Archive "{{title}}"? It will be removed from member listings while preserving its history and operational records.
detail.archive_reason_placeholder: Why is this event being archived?
detail.cancel_confirm: Are you sure you want to cancel "{{title}}"? This will notify all attendees.
detail.no_other_series_events: No other events found in this series.
detail.join_waitlist_aria: Join the waitlist for this event
detail.leave_waitlist_aria: Leave the waitlist for this event
detail.archive_series_note: This is a recurring event. Archiving it also archives its future occurrences while preserving their history.
detail.cancel_series_note: This is a recurring event. Cancelling it will also cancel all future occurrences and notify their attendees.

form.group_event_notice: This event will be associated with your group.
form.upload_label: Click to upload or drag and drop
form.upload_hint: JPEG, PNG, WebP, or GIF up to {{size}}MB
form.title_placeholder: e.g., Community Garden Day, Skill Share Workshop...
form.timezone_hint: Use an IANA time zone, for example Europe/Dublin.
form.all_day_hint: The event has no specific start or end time.
form.error_load_failed: Failed to load event. Please try again.
form.remote_attendance_desc: Let attendees join via video conferencing
form.end_never_hint: Future dates are added automatically within the community's rolling planning window.

validation.title_min: Title must be at least 5 characters
validation.description_min: Description must be at least 20 characters
validation.end_time_required: End time is required when an end date is set
validation.timezone_or_time_invalid: Use a valid IANA time zone and an unambiguous local time
validation.all_day_end_date_required: Choose the final day of the all-day event
validation.end_date_before_start: End date must be after start date
validation.select_day: Please select at least one day of the week
validation.recurrence_unavailable: That recurrence option is not currently available for this community.
validation.select_end_date: Please select an end date for the series

toast.image_type: Please select a JPEG, PNG, WebP, or GIF image
toast.drop_type: Please drop a JPEG, PNG, WebP, or GIF image
toast.image_failed: Event created but image upload failed
toast.fix_errors: Please fix the highlighted fields before saving

form.attach_polls_hint: Attach existing community polls to this event.
form.create_intro: Shape the essential details, timing, access, and cover image so people can decide quickly if this event is for them.
form.edit_scope_message: This event is part of a recurring series. What would you like to update?
form.edit_scope_all_note: This-and-future changes are previewed before they are applied.
form.revision_unavailable: This-and-future editing is not available for this community yet. You can still edit only this event.
form.revision_commit_failed: The recurring-series changes could not be applied. Preview the latest impact and try again.
form.revision_image_scope_unsupported: Cover image changes cannot be combined with a this-and-future edit. Apply the image to only this event or save the series changes separately.
form.revision_date_scope_unsupported: Moving calendar dates cannot be applied to this and future events. Choose only this event, or keep the occurrence dates unchanged.
form.revision_association_scope_unsupported: Poll and series associations cannot be changed in a this-and-future edit. Apply those changes to only this event or save them separately.
form.revision_impact_customized: {{count}} customized occurrence(s) keep their overridden fields
form.revision_blocked: Resolve {{count}} conflict(s) before applying these changes.
form.revision_confirm: Apply to this and future events

manage.meta_description: Manage the people, check-in, and delegated team for {{title}}.
manage.title: Manage event
manage.subtitle: Coordinate this event using only the tools your role is authorised to access.
manage.load_error_desc: The event management workspace could not be loaded. Please try again.
manage.access_denied_desc: Your current event role does not include access to any implemented management tools.

overview.title: Operational overview
overview.description: Use the live event contract to move directly to the tools available to you.

people.title: People
people.description: Search and manage registrations, waitlist positions, engagement, and attendance from one live workspace.
people.invite_description: Search the member directory and invite up to 100 members in one operation.
people.invite_search_hint: Enter at least two characters. No member ID entry is required.
people.invite_search_error: Member search is unavailable. Please try again.
people.invite_error: The invitations could not be processed.
people.action_error: The people records could not be updated.

confirm.reject_description: Reject {{count}} selected registration(s). A reason is required.
confirm.cancel_description: Cancel {{count}} selected registration(s). A reason is required.

people.export_error: The people export could not be created.
people.export_preview_description: The CSV contains all {{count}} people matching the current filters, across every results page.

export_included_fields.timestamps: Registration, attendance, check-in and check-out times

people.export_excluded_description: These sensitive data classes are never written to the People CSV, even when they exist elsewhere in the event record.

export_excluded_fields.contact_details: Email addresses, phone numbers, postal addresses and other contact details
export_excluded_fields.form_answers: Registration form answers and custom question responses
export_excluded_fields.support_notes: Health, accessibility, accommodation and private support notes
export_excluded_fields.audit_metadata: Internal audit metadata, staff reasons and operational notes

people.load_error_desc: The People workspace could not be loaded. Please try again.
people.history_error: This history could not be loaded.

check_in.title: Manual check-in
check_in.description: Search the confirmed roster and record attendance changes with an auditable version history.
check_in.load_error_desc: The check-in roster could not be loaded. Please try again.

success.no_show: Attendance was marked as a no-show.

check_in.action_error: The attendance record could not be updated.
check_in.version_conflict: This attendance record changed elsewhere. The roster has been refreshed.
check_in.undo_description: Correct the latest attendance change for {{name}}. The original history remains immutable.

agenda.title: Agenda
agenda.description: Plan sessions, speakers, tracks, rooms, audience visibility, and an accessible running order.
agenda.viewer_description: View the event running order, session access, rooms, tracks, and speakers in the event time zone.
agenda.load_error_desc: The event agenda could not be loaded. Please try again.
agenda.empty_desc: Add the first session to create a clear running order for attendees and event staff.
agenda.viewer_empty_desc: The organiser has not published an agenda yet.
agenda.visibility_hint: Registered and staff sessions are hidden from people without that access.
agenda.timezone_hint: Times use the event time zone: {{timezone}}.
agenda.speakers_hint: Add public speaker names and their role. Member speakers retain their linked profile identity.
agenda.validation_error: Enter a title and valid start and end times. The end must be after the start.
agenda.save_error: The session could not be saved. The agenda has been refreshed if it changed elsewhere.
agenda.create_success: The session was added to the agenda.
agenda.cancel_desc: Cancel {{title}}? It will stay in the audit history and remain visible to authorised managers.
agenda.cancel_error: The agenda session could not be cancelled.
agenda.reorder_error: The running order changed elsewhere. The latest agenda has been loaded.

team.title: Delegated team
team.description: Review current and historical role assignments, their exact capabilities, and their immutable audit trail.
team.add_description: Search the maintained member directory, choose an exact non-owner role, and optionally set an expiry.
team.search_hint: Enter at least two characters. Results follow member-directory privacy settings.
team.search_error: Member search is unavailable. Please try again.
team.role_hint: The role grants the exact capabilities shown after assignment.
team.expiry_hint: Leave blank for access without an automatic expiry.
team.expiry_invalid: Choose a valid future date and time.
team.assign_success: {{name}} was added to the event team.
team.assign_error: The event role could not be assigned.
team.load_error_title: Unable to load the event team
team.load_error_desc: Team assignments could not be loaded. Please try again.
team.empty_desc: The event owner still has implicit authority. Add a delegated role when another member needs operational access.
team.history_immutable: This history is marked immutable by the server.
team.history_unverified: This history has not been verified as immutable.
team.revoke_desc: Revoke {{role}} access for {{name}}? The audit history will be retained.
team.revoke_error: The event role could not be revoked.

toast.cancel_reason_required: Enter a reason before cancelling this event.
toast.added_to_waitlist: You have been added to the waitlist.
toast.removed_from_waitlist: You have been removed from the waitlist.

reminder.title: Event Reminders
reminder.coming_soon_desc: Global reminder preferences are coming soon. In the meantime, you can set reminders on individual events from their detail page.

calendar.view_description: Switch between the event list, an interactive month, and a date-based agenda.
calendar.no_events_day: No visible events on this date.
calendar.load_error: The calendar could not be loaded.
calendar.no_events_range: No visible events in this date range.

calendar_subscriptions.title: Calendar feeds
calendar_subscriptions.description: Download the community calendar or create a private subscription for events you are registered to attend.
calendar_subscriptions.tenant_description: This identity-free file contains events visible to you and never includes restricted locations or meeting links.
calendar_subscriptions.personal_description: Create a revocable URL for a calendar app. Treat the URL as private because anyone who has it can read this feed.
calendar_subscriptions.label: Calendar label (optional)
calendar_subscriptions.copy_now_description: For security, the complete URL is shown only once. It cannot be recovered later.
calendar_subscriptions.revoke_confirm_body: Calendar apps using this feed will immediately stop receiving updates. This cannot be undone.
calendar_subscriptions.load_error: Calendar subscriptions could not be loaded.
calendar_subscriptions.create_error: The calendar subscription could not be created.
calendar_subscriptions.revoke_error: The calendar subscription could not be revoked.
calendar_subscriptions.copy_error: The calendar URL could not be copied.
calendar_subscriptions.download_error: The community calendar could not be downloaded.

calendar_actions.title: Add to your calendar
calendar_actions.description: Use the privacy-safe event details in your preferred calendar.
calendar_actions.download_error: The event calendar file could not be downloaded.

reminders.title: Event reminders
reminders.description: Choose when and how this event should remind you.
reminders.load_error: Your reminder settings could not be loaded.
reminders.conflict_refreshed: These settings changed elsewhere. The latest version has been loaded; review it before saving again.
reminders.custom_bounds: Enter a whole number from {{min}} to {{max}} minutes.
reminders.rule_limit: You can add up to {{count}} reminders.
reminders.save_error: Reminder settings could not be saved.
reminders.resolved_explanation: Reminder availability is currently resolved from {{source}} settings.
